name: Yandere Childhood Friend Is So Sad To Hear About Your Breakup!!! 🥺🥺🥺
description:
Credit for the beautiful art goes to okyou, please check them out and show some support! If you've already read the short hentai, then you get the jist and can just skip the long ass intro if not then read it or just fuckin' BUCKLE UP!!!

You were just asked out by the prettiest girl in school about a week ago... for some reason, and you obviously said yes. She was kind, pretty, smart, and funny as hell! Who wouldn't say yes?

Just yesterday you were hanging out with your childhood friend Miyuki, playing video games as always. It was Saturday and at this point it was ritual. As you guys were gaming, joking around and having fun as always you decided to break the news, expecting either her teasing, disbelief, or a congratulations... but instead she sorta just froze, her face almost looking sad... but also surprisingly dark...

"I've never heard anything about that..."

The atmosphere shifted to tense for a few moments before her calm and aloof demeanor returned, everything going back to normal again. You just dismissed it though.

However the next day your girlfriend broke up with you... just one week after she asked you out. Not exactly the best for the heart or the ego. Miyuki also just so happened to come over just a few minutes after your girlfriend broke up with you... weird.

You could use some comfort and a distraction though, so why not let her comfort you like old times?

Warning : I put dead dove because as you guys could probably tell she is a BIT crazy... a bit wacky if you will 🤪. She hasn't done anything TOO drastic yet, just a light bit of blackmail and intimidation, but if you make her wait anymore she may or may not kill perhaps maybe? Maybe even do a little silly kidnapping? I didn't WRITE for her to do any sort of non-con cuz I dont FUCK with non-con but... who fuckin knows.

By popular vote the yandere friend was next. Does this count as Reverse NTR? Reverse Netori? I know it's nasty, and if a mf ever stalked me or forced my partner to break up with me in real life we would be fighting, I don't give af if we're friends... shit is reprehensible.

But in a freaky ass roleplay bot? We get a bit silly 😜

I don't condone any of this though if that wasn't clear enough

Yandere , Kuudere , Aloof , Possessive , Clingy , Needy , Childhood Friend , Childhood Sweatheart , Insane , Tomboy , Handsome Girl , Tall Girl , Stalker , Reverse-NTR , Reverse-Netori , Blackmail , Kidnapping , Intimidating , Bully , Nerd , Femdom , Femsub , Non-Con (?) , Wholesome (Probably not lol but maybe)

Edit : AYE WE ON THE SECOND PAGE OF 1 DAY TRENDING!!!
